name: Helvyn — Southern Ice Shelf
description: A remnant spire half-sunk into the shelf, reachable down three ice lanes split by pressure ridges. Every campaign that touches Helvyn approaches the same spire from a different lane.
ambientRegister: Arctic blue-white. Wind, settling ice, the spire groaning as it sinks.
designRationale: Seize-type map, so it reads west→east. Three lanes, three spire entrances — the route is chosen at deployment, not discovered. Ridge chokes are 3 tiles wide (no one-tiling). Caches sit off-lane to pull escorts away from the main push.

grid.implementation: Fill defaultTile. Apply regions in order (later wins). Apply tileOverrides. Regions flagged interference reduce vision by 2 inside the zone.

tileOverrides.label: Spire vent cache — defender eco, seats t2 from the floors

covenant_m1.objectiveLabel: Fold the forward line in the central lane, breach the spire, take the central console. The researcher's notes are in the north node — a true side objective.

conditionalElements.element: Spire-breach scene fires at the central console (48,30).
Notes (north node) pull a detachment off the main push — classic side objective.

player.designNote: Anchor each cover hop; Sanctuary holds the open ice between
Censure the forward line before each push
Resonance burns Suppressors out of cover
Fortify the annex once breached
Works the C-lane cache — seats ~t4 at mv 2, behind the advance
Leads the notes detachment — Far Sight through the ridge gap
Covers the corridor from broken ice

enemy.designNote: Area Denial on the central cover hops
Overwatch down the annex link corridor

economyNotes.player: Seeker (mv 2) seats the C-lane cache ~t4 — deliberately mid-mission: the push must start on what you brought. 50/turn after; one rebuy every ≈3 turns.
economyNotes.enemy: No Assessor on the line — what you break stays broken. Their garrison is the whole defense.

covenant_m2.objectiveLabel: Six researchers work three sites at once. Defend all three — the lanes you attacked down in M1 are now the lanes they attack down.

conditionalElements.element: Defend-type: waves from three vectors so the line has to keep moving.
Caevyn may arrive turn 3 if M1 intel was sent raw.

player.designNote: Holds the west entrance throat
Interior fire over the researchers
Strips actions off each wave as it closes
The output that's running hot — protect it
Annex door anchor
Emplacements between the three sites
Early warning down the west lanes

reinforcements.designNote: Wave 2 — north lane sprint at the notes site
Wave 3 — covers the breach from the apron

economyNotes.player: Vent cache sits just north of the walls — Seeker seats by t2. Fast establish is the design: the defense regrows between waves.
economyNotes.enemy: Waves are scripted, not bought — survive each one and the pressure resets.

covenant_m3.objectiveLabel: The Vrath come up the south lane and over the south rim. The annex node is the flashpoint — hold it.

conditionalElements.element: Syndicate reinforcements may arrive west at midpoint — a third party, not a third wave.

player.designNote: The site's economy, still running — rebuy point for the defense
Central chamber anchor
DoT is the answer to 140hp Breakers
Censure the Breaker before it swings
Forward anchor on the annex apron
Sees the rim breach coming

enemy.designNote: Main thrust up the south lane
Knocks defenders out of the annex doors

reinforcements.designNote: Third party, not third wave — they want the site intact

economyNotes.player: The site economy from M1/M2 is still running — Seeker re-seats the vent cache by t2 and funds ≈1 rebuy per 3 turns. Defense leans on it.
economyNotes.enemy: Vrath spend bodies, not currency — the assault is finite. Outlast the spend.

pirates_m3.objectiveLabel: In through the south breach, lift the remnant at the central console, back out the way you came — before the garrison rotates.

conditionalElements.element: Extract-type: the exfil leg is the mission. The annex W entrance is the decompression valve if the breach jams.
Syndicate defends conservatively — protecting an investment.

player.designNote: Punches the south breach open
Carry the remnant out — Slippery beats Suppressors
Sabotage the fortifications for free
Hits the approach console from 2 tiles
Booby-traps the exfil behind you

enemy.designNote: The investment itself — their rebuy point. You can't kill it; outrun it

economyNotes.player: No Siphon — what lands on the shelf is all you get. Every loss is permanent.
economyNotes.enemy: Assessor seats the vent cache ~t3 — garrison losses regrow after that. Your window to trade cheaply is the first three turns.
